nodes.label: AI as time-saving writing assistant
nodes.grounding_span: the longer it takes to get a small piece of writing correct, the less I am getting paid

nodes.label: AI adherence to human writing style
nodes.label_negative: AI defaulting to generic AI patterns
nodes.grounding_span: the AI usually uses words and phrases such as 'moreover', 'add a touch of timeless style'

nodes.label: AI factual accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: the AI kept including examples but when I fact checked I could not find this information

nodes.label: AI as quality enhancer for skilled writers
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch for lazy writers producing subpar work
nodes.grounding_span: there are writers that have defaulted to using AI and are lazy

nodes.label: AI image generation accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: the AI gave me an image of a child drawing at a table with another child watering them

nodes.label: Financial compensation and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I get paid by the word and not by the hour

nodes.label: Professional quality and SEO performance
nodes.grounding_span: Google is getting clever at realising how AI writes and penalising websites

nodes.label: Creative control and authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: edit myself to make it sound like a human wrote it

nodes.label: Frustration with AI correction loops
nodes.grounding_span: It is actually really frustrating because I get paid by the word

nodes.label: Confidence in human superiority for quality work
nodes.grounding_span: if you want quality SEO optimized text then a human writer is the only option

nodes.label: Frustration with AI fabrication
nodes.grounding_span: the AI kept including examples but when I fact checked I could not find this information

nodes.label: Annoyance with AI image generation failures
nodes.grounding_span: it is annoying because I will quote for the website work and then simple things like finding images are taking far too long

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through specific instructions and corrections
nodes.grounding_span: I need to be very specific with instructions

nodes.label: Strategic task allocation based on efficiency and quality
nodes.grounding_span: sometimes SEO writing is easier to do myself
